title: GUI Improvements
description: A simple resource pack that adds sleek black outlines to certain parts of GUIs, such as the (survival) inventory, furnace, hopper, loom, villagers, and more!
body:
# GUI Improvements 

This is a simple resource pack that adds sleek black outlines to some boxes to some GUIs. 

## What Textures It Changes

- Anvil
- Beacon
- Blast furnace
- Brewing stand
- Cartography table
- Crafting table
- Dispenser
- Dropper
- Enchanting table
- Furnace
- Grindstone
- Hopper
- Horse inventory screen
- Player inventory (survival mode)
- OLD smithing table texture (The texture is still in the game for some reason, not sure why)
- Loom
- Smithing table
- Smoker
- Stonecutter
- Villager trading GUI

## Quick Note

You may use these textures in other packs or whatever, but linking back to this Modrinth page would be appreciated.

## Join My Discord

- Make suggestions, report issues, etc.
- View my to-do list with all planned future updates and new packs
- Might get early access to new packs in future

https://discord.gg/TkFb7V8Bya

## Other Info

If you'd like to see what any of these look like before downloading the pack, check out the Gallery tab above.

I will likely release updates to this pack to make it better over time.

If you'd like to make suggestions/report issues, you can do so on my [discord](https://discord.gg/TkFb7V8Bya)! 

## Planned Updates

- Add support for older Minecraft versions
- Make a version of the pack for Bedrock Edition
